const normalizeText = (value) => String(value || "").trim().toLowerCase();

/** Wikimedia thumbnails where clubs are absent or ambiguous on api-sports. */
const WIKI_LOGO = {
  blackpool:
    "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/d/df/Blackpool_FC_logo.svg/330px-Blackpool_FC_logo.svg.png",
  bradfordPA:
    "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/6/62/Bradford_%28Park_Avenue%29_A.F.C._logo.png",
  bury: "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/6/65/Bury_FC_crest.svg/330px-Bury_FC_crest.svg.png",
  darwen: "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/f/fe/Darwen_FC_crest.png",
  glossopNE: "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/5/5e/GNE_afc_badge.png",
  grimsby:
    "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/d/db/Grimsby_Town_F.C._logo.svg/330px-Grimsby_Town_F.C._logo.svg.png",
  leytonOrient:
    "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/a/a8/Leyton_Orient_F.C._logo.svg/330px-Leyton_Orient_F.C._logo.svg.png",
  wimbledon:
    "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/b/b3/Wimbledon_FC_crest.svg/330px-Wimbledon_FC_crest.svg.png",
};

/** api-sports.io crest URLs (and a few Wikimedia URLs) keyed by normalized CSV / UI names */
export const EPL_TEAM_LOGO_URLS = {
  accrington: "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/1355.png",
  "accrington stanley": "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/1355.png",

  "birmingham city": "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/54.png",
  blackburn: "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/67.png",
  "blackburn rovers": "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/67.png",
  blackpool: WIKI_LOGO.blackpool,

  brighton: "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/51.png",
  "brighton & hove albion": "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/51.png",
  "bristol city": "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/56.png",
  burnley: "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/44.png",
  bury: WIKI_LOGO.bury,
  "cardiff city": "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/43.png",
  "carlisle united": "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/1339.png",
  "charlton ath": "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/748.png",
  "charlton athletic": "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/748.png",
  charlton: "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/748.png",
  chelsea: "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/49.png",

  "oxford united": "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/1338.png",
  portsmouth: "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/1350.png",
  preston: "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/59.png",
  "preston north end": "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/59.png",
  qpr: "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/70.png",
  "queens park rangers": "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/70.png",
  reading: "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/53.png",

  swindon: "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/1360.png",
  "swindon town": "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/1360.png",
  "the wednesday": "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/64.png",
  tottenham: "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/47.png",
  "tottenham hotspur": "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/47.png",
  watford: "https://media.api-sports.io/football/teams/38.png",

export function getEplTeamLogoUrl(teamName) {
  return EPL_TEAM_LOGO_URLS[normalizeText(teamName)] || null;
}
